We opened our doors in February 2016 and have been making out-of-the-box flavors and styles of craft beer ever since. We focus on creating unique beers with the utmost quality and we look forward to welcoming you into our taprooms!

ABout SGB east nashville
Opened in December 2021, just a mile and a half from our original Porter Road location, our brand new taproom offers twice the capacity and features a full kitchen and restaurant concept. Despite having ample space and 2 full size patios, our new location maintains a cozy neighborhood vibe.
Our spacious wraparound bar, a focal point of the taproom, features 40 tap handles, allowing us to offer up to 25 different beers at any one time. We are proud to offer on site parking for our guests. Other amenities include, a self-serve cooler offering to-go 4 packs and singles, large merchandise area, multiple TVs, and 2 large patios.
Tucked inside our East Nashville location, Lauter is Southern Grist’s first foray into food—now with a fresh focus on elevated classics. Reimagining American staples, Lauter offers chef-driven burgers, golden beer-battered fries, and vibrant salads delivering comfort food with a refined edge. Casual, but far from ordinary.
Whether you’re looking to just enjoy a flight of Southern Grist, grab a snack, or sit down for a full service, memorable meal, our new location at 754 Douglas Ave has something for everyone. We can’t wait to welcome you in!
Looking for our other location?
View The Nations Taproom Details
